name: FS KKR Capital Corp
business: FS KKR Capital Corp is a business development company that invests primarily in senior secured debt of private middle-market U.S. companies, aiming to generate current income and long-term capital appreciation.

exposures.sentence: Health Care Equipment & Services 12.8% of portfolio.
Pharmaceuticals, Biotechnology & Life Sciences 1.7% of portfolio.
We, our affiliates and our and their respective third-party service providers are subject to cybersecurity risks.
We are subject to risks associated with artificial intelligence and machine learning technology.
